case_title: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING VS CORPORATE IMAGES INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,800.50 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT CORPORATE IMAGES INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-22-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
